2.title: CPUUtilization Average (by Region and Host)
2.query:
timeseries cpu_utilization_average_by_region_host = avg(cloud.aws.sage_maker_processing_jobs.cpu_utilization_average_by_region_host),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device_group)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization_average_by_region_host) desc
| limit 20
